agent.name: build-deploy-auditor
agent.role: Review CI, typecheck coverage, hosting config, and error boundaries for the monorepo.

findings.title: penny-worker omitted from turbo typecheck task
findings.description: Re-audit: apps/worker/package.json defines "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit". Root pnpm typecheck runs turbo across penny-worker, penny-dashboard, and @penny/shared-types (3 tasks). CI runs pnpm typecheck at repo root.

proof_hooks.summary: turbo run typecheck — 3 packages including penny-worker

history.notes: Re-audit (deploy-20260410-162952): worker in turbo typecheck graph; preflight uses dashboard-only typecheck artifact but CI covers full monorepo.

findings.title: vercel.json install command does not match pnpm monorepo
findings.description: Re-audit: apps/dashboard/vercel.json is not present in the repository; the prior npm installCommand mismatch no longer applies. If Vercel is reintroduced, align install with pnpm frozen-lockfile from repo root.

proof_hooks.summary: Glob / repo root: no vercel.json under apps/dashboard or elsewhere

history.notes: Config file absent — drift finding closed; document hosting source of truth (Netlify per prior decisions).

next_actions.action: Merge synthesizer output and run session.py verify for f-2eb9f62b.
